channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BBOX] Black Box Ltd Completes Acquisition of 2S Inovações Tecnológicas
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Black Box Ltd announced the completion of the acquisition of 100% stake in 2S Inovações Tecnológicas, a Brazilian solutions integrator, by its step-down subsidiary, BLACK BOX DO BRASIL INDÚSTRIA E COMÉRCIO LTDA. The acquisition, initially announced on February 12, 2026, was completed on May 13, 2026, at 2:00 a.m. IST and is effective from May 1, 2026. All terms and conditions related to the acquisition have been fulfilled.

  • Black Box Ltd completes 100% stake acquisition of 2S Inovações Tecnológicas.
  • Acquisition was executed through BLACK BOX DO BRASIL INDÚSTRIA E COMÉRCIO LTDA.
  • The acquisition is effective from May 1, 2026.
  • All terms and conditions for the acquisition have been met.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Black Box Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RATNAVEER] Ratnaveer Precision Engineering: FY26 Financial Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd. has announced its financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company highlights its global reach, serving over 800 clients across 31 countries, and its annual washer output of over 1.8 billion units. Ratnaveer is also diversifying into Copper Clad Laminates (CCL) manufacturing with a new facility in Gujarat, investing ₹338 Crore over 3 years with a projected capacity of 1.6 million CCL sheets annually.

  • Ratnaveer serves 800+ clients across 31 countries.
  • Annual washer output exceeds 1.8 billion units.
  • CCL project approved with ₹338 Crore investment.
  • New Gujarat facility to produce 1.6 million CCL sheets annually.
  • Focus on FR-4 grade laminates for PCB manufacturing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [EUROPRATIK] Euro Pratik Sales: Revenue Up 28% YoY to ₹93.5 Cr in Q4FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Euro Pratik Sales Ltd announced its financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. In Q4 FY26, revenue from operations reached ₹93.5 crore, a 28% year-on-year growth. EBITDA stood at ₹25.6 crore, reflecting a 37% year-on-year increase, with an EBITDA margin of 27.3%. Profit After Tax (PAT) was ₹21.5 crore, a 50% year-on-year increase, with a PAT margin of 23.0%. The company successfully navigated currency volatility and logistical challenges. Recent launches include Canfor 2 and the Chisel 2026 series. The acquisition of Chawla Brothers has strengthened Euro Pratik’s presence in North India.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹93.5 crore, up 28% YoY.
  • EBITDA in Q4 FY26 stood at ₹25.6 crore, a 37% YoY increase.
  • Q4 FY26 Profit After Tax (PAT) was ₹21.5 crore, up 50% YoY.
  • Euro Pratik acquired Chawla Brothers to strengthen North India presence.
  • Company reports strong revenue and PAT growth for Q4 FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SKFINDUS] SKF India Appoints Joshi Apte as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27
item.description:
SKF India (Industrial) Ltd has appointed M/s Joshi Apte & Associates, Cost Accountants, as their Cost Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The appointment was approved by the Board of Directors on May 12, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee, and is in compliance with Section 148 of the Companies Act, 2013. M/s Joshi Apte & Associates is a peer-reviewed firm with 17 years of experience in Cost Management Accountancy.

  • M/s Joshi Apte & Associates appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment approved by the Board on May 12, 2026.
  • The firm has 17 years of experience in Cost Management Accountancy.
  • Appointment complies with Section 148 of the Companies Act, 2013.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKF India (Industrial) Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [SKFINDUS] SKF India Appoints J B Bhave & Co as Secretarial Auditors
item.description:
SKF India (Industrial) Ltd has appointed M/s J B Bhave & Co. Company Secretaries as the Secretarial Auditors for a term of 5 years, commencing from the financial year 2026-27 to 2030-31. The appointment, based on the Audit Committee's recommendation and Board approval on May 12, 2026, is subject to member approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. M/s J B Bhave & Co is a Pune-based firm with Mr. Jayavant B. Bhave having over 30 years of experience.

  • SKF India appoints M/s J B Bhave & Co as Secretarial Auditors.
  • The appointment is for a 5-year term, from FY 2026-27 to 2030-31.
  • Appointment is subject to member approval at the next AGM.
  • M/s J B Bhave & Co is a peer-reviewed firm based in Pune.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKF India (Industrial) Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [SKFINDUS] SKF India Appoints Samdani & Co as Tax Auditors for FY27
item.description:
SKF India (Industrial) Ltd has appointed M/s Samdani & Co, Chartered Accountants, as Tax and GST Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The appointment was made based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors at its meeting on May 12, 2026. M/s Samdani & Co was formed in 2016 and provides audit, litigation, business, and advisory services.

  • Samdani & Co appointed as Tax and GST Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment approved by the Board on May 12, 2026.
  • Samdani & Co provides audit and advisory services.
  • Appointment follows Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) guidelines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKF India (Industrial) Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [SKFINDUS] SKF India: Record Date for Dividend Fixed as 3rd July 2026
item.description:
SKF India (Industrial) Ltd has fixed 3rd July 2026 as the record date for the dividend. This follows the board meeting on 12th May 2026, where the board recommended a final dividend of ₹10 per equity share for the financial year ended 31st March 2026, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting. If approved, the dividend will be paid on or before 11th September 2026.

  • SKF India sets 3rd July 2026 as record date for final dividend.
  • Dividend of ₹10 per share proposed for FY26, pending shareholder approval.
  • Payment date for dividend, if approved, is on or before 11th September 2026.
  • Auditors issued unmodified opinion on FY26 financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKF India (Industrial) Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SKFINDUS] SKF India Recommends ₹10 Dividend for FY 2026-27
item.description:
SKF India's Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹10 per equity share for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The record date for determining shareholders eligible for the dividend is set for July 3, 2026, and the dividend, if approved, will be paid on or before September 11, 2026. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from the statutory auditors, Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP.

  • SKF India recommends a final dividend of ₹10 per share for FY 2026-27.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is set for July 3, 2026.
  • Dividend payment, if approved, will be made on or before September 11, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY 2026-27 received an unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKF India (Industrial) Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [RATNAVEER] Ratnaveer Precision Engg Appoints Kashyap Shah as Ind. Director
item.description:
Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Kashyap Shah as an Additional Director in the capacity of an Independent Director, effective May 12, 2026, for a term of 5 years, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Shah, a Company Secretary with over 20 years of experience, is not related to any existing directors or key managerial personnel. He currently does not hold any shares in the company.

  • Kashyap Shah appointed as Independent Director effective May 12, 2026.
  • Appointment is for a 5-year term, pending shareholder approval.
  • Mr. Shah has over 20 years of experience as a Company Secretary.
  • He is not related to any directors or key managerial personnel.
  • Mr. Shah currently holds no shares in Ratnaveer Precision Engineering.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [EUROPRATIK] Euro Pratik Sales: Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Euro Pratik Sales Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved these results at a meeting held on May 12, 2026. The meeting also addressed a fine imposed by NSE and BSE for non-compliance regarding the short notice of a record date for interim dividend payment, which the company has already paid.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Unmodified audit opinion issued by CNK & Associates LLP and Monika Jain & Co.
  • Fine of ₹10,000 paid for short notice on interim dividend record date.
  • Board meeting commenced at 5:30 p.m. and concluded at 8.30 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
